title: Give Me Insight to Learn Your Commands

verses.text: Give me insight to learn your commands, For you made me and fashioned me, Lord. May your saints, when they see me, rejoice, Since I placed all my hope in your word.
Lord, I know that your judgements are just; You have faithfully disciplined me. May your merciful love bring relief, As you promised your servant in need.
Show me mercy that I may have life, For your law is my constant delight. Shame the proud who defame me with lies; I will ponder your precepts aright.
Those who fear you, Lord, turn them to me, So they learn to discern your decrees. Teach my heart to be pure in your laws, That no shame or disgrace come to me.
